rule_metadata.name: xz_magic
rule_metadata.author: @h3x2b <tracker@h3x.eu>
rule_metadata.description: Detects XZ stream magics in ELF executable

rules.rule_text:
rule xz_magic : info compress
{
	meta:
		author = "@h3x2b <tracker@h3x.eu>"
		description = "Detects XZ stream magics in ELF executable"

	strings:
		$xz_00 = { fd 37 7a 58 }
		$xz_01 = "YZB"

	condition:
		uint32be( 0 ) == 0x7f454c46 and 2 of ( $xz_* )
}
